pages.text: 早上，太阳公公爬上了窗户。咘咘揉揉眼睛，打了一个大大的哈欠。NOMI 端着小杯子和牙刷走过来：“起床啦咘咘，该刷牙啦！”
pages.text_en: Morning! The sun peeked through the window. Bubu rubbed her eyes and gave a big yawn. NOMI came over with a little cup and toothbrush. "Wake up, Bubu! Time to brush your teeth!"

pages.text: NOMI 在咘咘的小牙刷上挤了一颗豌豆大小的牙膏。“小小一颗就够啦！不用很多很多哦。”咘咘睁大眼睛看着，好像一颗白色的小珍珠！
pages.text_en: NOMI squeezed a pea-sized blob of toothpaste onto Bubu's little toothbrush. "A tiny bit is enough! Not too much!" Bubu stared — it looked like a little white pearl!

pages.text: 咘咘站在小板凳上，对着镜子张大嘴巴——啊！小白牙一颗一颗全露出来了。NONO 飞到水龙头上，歪着脑袋好奇地看：“嘴巴好大呀！”
pages.text_en: Bubu stood on her step stool and opened wide in the mirror — aah! All her little white teeth showed. NONO flew to the faucet and tilted his head. "What a big mouth!"

pages.text: NOMI 拿起牙刷做示范：“看好了哦！牙刷平平放在牙齿上，来回来回刷——滋、滋、滋！”牙刷轻轻地在牙齿上滑来滑去，白色的泡泡冒出来了。
pages.text_en: NOMI showed her how. "Watch! Lay the brush flat on your teeth and go back and forth — swish, swish, swish!" The brush glided gently, and white bubbles appeared.

pages.text: 咘咘学着 NOMI 的样子，把牙刷放在右边的小牙齿上。来回来回，滋滋滋！“对对对，就是这样！”NOMI 开心地拍拍手。
pages.text_en: Bubu copied NOMI and put the brush on her right teeth. Back and forth — swish swish swish! "Yes yes yes, just like that!" NOMI clapped happily.

pages.text: 再换到左边——滋滋滋！牙刷平平的，来回来回。NONO 站在旁边，小脑袋跟着牙刷左右晃，晃过来，晃过去，好像在跳舞！
pages.text_en: Now the left side — swish swish swish! The brush went flat, back and forth. NONO's little head swayed left and right with the brush, like dancing!

pages.text: 前面的门牙也不能忘！咘咘张开嘴巴“咿——”，牙刷在门牙上滋滋滋。上面刷刷，下面刷刷，每颗牙齿都要刷到哦！
pages.text_en: Don't forget the front teeth! Bubu opened wide — "eee!" The brush went swish swish on the front teeth. Brush the top, brush the bottom — every tooth gets a turn!

pages.text: NOMI 翻过来一个小沙漏：“要刷五分钟哦！我们一起数！”一分钟……两分钟……三分钟……四分钟……五分钟到啦！沙漏里的沙子全部漏完了！
pages.text_en: NOMI flipped over a little hourglass. "Brush for five minutes! Let's count together!" One minute... two... three... four... five! All the sand ran out!

pages.text: 刷完了！嘴巴里好多白白的泡泡。咘咘低下头，对着洗手台“呸——”把泡泡吐出来。“牙膏泡泡不能咽到肚子里哦，要吐出来！”NOMI 竖起大拇指。
pages.text_en: All done! Bubu's mouth was full of white bubbles. She leaned over the sink and — ptoo! — spit them out. "Don't swallow the toothpaste bubbles — spit them out!" NOMI gave a thumbs up.

pages.text: 咘咘捧起小杯子，喝一口水，鼓起腮帮子“咕噜咕噜——”然后“呸！”吐出来。再来一次，咕噜咕噜——呸！嘴巴里干干净净了！
pages.text_en: Bubu picked up her little cup, took a sip of water, puffed her cheeks — gurgle gurgle — then ptoo! One more time — gurgle gurgle — ptoo! All clean!

pages.text:
咘咘对着镜子咧开嘴，露出亮晶晶的小白牙！一闪一闪的，像小星星！NOMI 和 NONO 也在镜子里笑。

张大嘴，啊！平平刷，滋滋滋！刷五分钟，呸！咘咘的牙齿亮晶晶！🪥✨
pages.text_en:
Bubu grinned at the mirror, showing her sparkly white teeth! Shining like little stars! NOMI and NONO smiled in the mirror too.

Open wide, aah! Brush flat, swish swish swish! Five minutes, then ptoo! Bubu's teeth are sparkly clean! 🪥✨
